title: Power-Grid Substation Siting: Weighted Coverage Packing
strategies: uniform-grid baseline: ceil(sqrt(n)) x ceil(sqrt(n)) grid, equal disk radius 1/(2k), weight-blind -> ~0.1
weight-proportional treemap: tile the region into rectangles with area ~ w_i, inscribe a disk in each; heavy loads get bigger disks
squared-weight treemap (area ~ w_i^2, the Lagrangian optimum r_i ~ w_i) followed by radius coordinate-ascent that reclaims inter-disk slack in descending-weight order
alternative refinements: center relocation / continuous packing local search, mixed allocation exponents between w and w^2 per instance
